note: Tier-0 frozen contract for mortie 1.x: orders 0-29, all 12 base cells, three tuple variants each (all1 / all4 / pseudo-random). 'word' is the canonical packed u64 (issue #58); 'decimal_repr' is the render-only decode-through-kernel string. Orders 0-18 are also cross-checked against the retired legacy decimal path; orders 19-29 have no external oracle and are pinned to the kernel's natural extension (shape-checked only). Regenerated and asserted byte-for-byte by test_packed_golden.py.
